title: carlina biebersteinii subsp. intermedia
intro: Carlina biebersteinii subsp. intermedia, also known as the Carline Thistle, is a plant species within the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Carlina biebersteinii subsp. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
